---
title: 'John 8: Ignore the rest, respond as God tells you!'
date: '2013-04-16T11:06:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1317707433705937695'
blogger_filename: '/2013/04/john-8-ignore-rest-respond-as-god-tells.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Daily Reading'
---

<h4>COME:</h4><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b><a href="https://www.youversion.com/bible/107/jhn.8.net" target="_blank">John 8</a></b><br /><blockquote><span class="verse v4" data-usfm="JHN.8.4" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">4</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;and said to Jesus,</span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;“Teacher, this woman was caught in the very act of adultery.&nbsp;</span></span><span class="verse v5" data-usfm="JHN.8.5" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">5</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;In the law&nbsp;</span><span class="it" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; font-style: italic; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">Moses commanded us to stone to death</span></span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;such women.</span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;What then do you say?”&nbsp;</span></span><span class="verse v6" data-usfm="JHN.8.6" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">6</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;(Now they were asking this in an attempt to trap him, so that they could bring charges against</span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;him.)</span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;Jesus bent down and wrote on the ground with his finger.</span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;</span></span><span class="verse v7" data-usfm="JHN.8.7" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">7</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;When they persisted in asking him, he stood up straight</span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;and replied,</span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">“Whoever among you is guiltless</span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;may be the first to throw a stone at her.”&nbsp;</span></span><span class="verse v8" data-usfm="JHN.8.8" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">8</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;Then</span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;he bent over again and wrote on the ground.</span></span><span class="verse v9" data-usfm="JHN.8.9" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">9</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;Now when they heard this, they began to drift away one at a time, starting with the older ones,</span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;until Jesus was left alone with the woman standing before him.&nbsp;</span></span><span class="verse v10" data-usfm="JHN.8.10" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">10</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;Jesus stood up straight</span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;and said to her, “Woman,</span><span class="note f" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; cursor: default; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;"></span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;where are they? Did no one condemn you?”&nbsp;</span></span><span class="verse v11" data-usfm="JHN.8.11" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 0px 3px; padding: 0px;"><span class="label" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; color: #666666; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; margin: 0.9em 4px 0px 0px; padding: 0px;">11</span><span class="content" style="-webkit-background-clip: padding; background-clip: padding-box; border: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px;">&nbsp;She replied, “No one, Lord.” And Jesus said, “I do not condemn you either. Go, and from now on do not sin any more.”]]</span></span></blockquote></blockquote><br /><br /><h4>HEAR:</h4>Notice how Jesus responded to pressure. Nearly ignored it. Many have speculated on what he wrote on the ground. I cannot speculate on that right now. Because what's more important is what the text says, not what it doesn't say. One day Oral Roberts and Jerry Savelle had a meeting with a high ranking official in Africa. Jerry was speaking with the Official and listening to him also. Oral was doodling on a napkin. He'd wad it up and throw it aside and start doodling again. Finally after having gone through several he tapped Jerry and said "Hey look at this"... Jerry thought it was a little rude to&nbsp;interrupt&nbsp;the Official but out of respect he looked at it.<br /><br />It read:<br /><blockquote class="tr_bq" style="text-align: center;">STREBOR LARO</blockquote>Oral said, "You know what that it?" Jerry said "I have no idea what that is." Oral said: "It's 'Oral Roberts' spelled backwards." Jerry said, "Oral are we boring you?" Oral said, "YES! You are all thinking to small!" and with that he laid out a bigger vision and the Official and Jerry got excited and the government there gave them a bunch of land to do it on.<br /><br />The point is, that Jesus didn't give in to pressure or situations. He didn't get disturbed by others lack of vision. He simply ignored it and gave the only response he HEARD the Father tell him to give.<br /><br /><h4>DO:</h4><br />I'm going to spend more time listening today, and less time talking. I'm going to try to ONLY say what the Father says.<br /><br /><br />DW<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><b>Have questions about anything I said here? Want to share your story? Comment Below!</b><br /><b><br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />I call you empowered 2 prosper with good success!</b><br /><b><br /></b><b>N2 Good Success</b><b><span style="font-size: x-small;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></b><br />Blog:&nbsp;<a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/" style="background-color: white;" target="_blank">http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/</a><br />Facebook:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Empowered-To-Prosper/231019763613118" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/EmpoweredTooProsper</a><br />Twitter:&nbsp;<a href="http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess</a><br /><br /><b style="background-color: white;">See Also:</b><br />Books by Darrell G. Wolfe:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.amazon.com/Darrell-Wolfe/e/B008F07FO6" style="font-family: verdana, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px;" target="_blank">Amazon.com/author/darrellgwolfe&nbsp;</a><br />Book Suggestions from the&nbsp;<a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/190-6424964-9305846" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Amazon Store</a><br />Brand and Product Offerings from&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Zazzle Store</a>
